competitions.product_info: Home – Rolex Day Date 18038 18k Solid Gold 1978 WIN A VINTAGE 18K SOLID GOLD ROLEX DAY-DATE 18038 W/ BOX Value: £8,000 Duration: 7 Days Age: Circa 1978 Max. Entries: 799 Ticket Price: £20 Live Draw: 23/06/26 The Rolex Day-Date is one of the most iconic watches of all time , and has been Rolex’s flagship model since its introduction in 1956, worn by presidents and influential figures across generations. This reference, the 18038 , dates to 1978 and is crafted in 18k solid yellow gold with the classic “champagne” dial . Featuring a sapphire crystal and the 3055 “single quick” calibre, this Day-Date is the perfect balance of vintage charm and everyday practicality . This watch is in very good condition , and is accompanied by its inner & outer box . 27.91% SOLD 0 Tickets Sold: 223 799 27.91% 576 Tickets remaining 576/799 Tickets Remaining Time Left to End: 4 Days 18 Hours 33 Minutes 55 Seconds ENTER NOW WIN A VINTAGE ROLEX DAY-DATE 18K SOLID GOLD 1978 ENTER NOW 27.91% SOLD 0 Tickets Sold: 223 799 27.91% 576 Tickets remaining 576/799 Tickets Remaining Time Left to End: 4 Days 18 Hours 33 Minutes 55 Seconds Value: £8,000 Duration: 7 Days Age: Circa 1978 Entries: 799 Max. Ticket Price: £20 Live Draw: 23/06/2026 The Rolex Day-Date is one of the most iconic watches of all time , and has been Rolex’s flagship model since its introduction in 1956, worn by presidents and influential figures across generations. This reference, the 18038 , dates to 1978 and is crafted in 18k solid yellow gold with the classic “champagne” dial . Featuring a sapphire crystal and the 3055 “single quick” calibre, this Day-Date is the perfect balance of vintage charm and everyday practicality . This watch is in very good condition , and is accompanied by its inner & outer box . #29 - The 18k Solid Gold Rolex Day Date 18038 w/ Box 1978 The History— The Example The Rolex Day-Date is one of the most iconic watches ever produced and has sat at the very top of the Rolex catalogue since its introduction in 1956. Crafted exclusively in precious metals and instantly recognisable by its day display at 12 o’clock, the Day-Date has long been associated with presidents, business leaders and influential figures across generations, earning it the enduring nickname of the “President.” This reference, the 18038 , dates to 1978 and represents one of the most desirable eras of Day-Date production. Crafted in 18k solid yellow gold and featuring the classic champagne dial , it captures everything collectors love about vintage Rolex. The 18038 was also an important step forward for the model, introducing a sapphire crystal and the Rolex calibre 3055 movement. Featuring the desirable single quickset date function, the calibre 3055 brought a level of practicality and convenience that earlier Day-Dates lacked, while maintaining the robustness and reliability for which Rolex is renowned. On the wrist, the watch delivers exactly what a Day-Date should: substantial without being excessive, elegant without feeling formal. The combination of yellow gold, fluted bezel and champagne dial remains one of the most timeless configurations Rolex has ever produced. This example is presented on an attractive brown leather strap, and is in very good condition , accompanied by its inner and outer box. Ticket Price: £20 Live Draw: 30/06/2026 The Rolex GMT-Master is one of the most iconic and popular watches ever made, and this example is a slight twist on a classic, known as the “Coke” for its red & black Coca-Cola colour palette bezel insert. This 16710 GMT-Master II reference is of its best iterations, perfectly balancing vintage styling with modern practicality . This example dates to 1997 and is in very sharp, immaculate condition , accompanied by its box, booklets & tag. #30 - The Rolex GMT-Master II "Coke" 16710 w/ Box, Booklets & Tag 1997 The History— The Example The Rolex GMT-Master II is one of the most iconic sports watches ever produced, originally developed for airline pilots travelling between time zones. This example is a slightly different take on the classic GMT formula, featuring the distinctive red and black “Coke” bezel – a configuration that has become increasingly sought after in recent years. The reference 16710 is widely regarded as one of the best GMT-Master II references, perfectly balancing vintage character with modern practicality. Powered by the Rolex calibre 3185 , it features an independently adjustable hour hand, allowing the wearer to track multiple time zones with ease. Dating to 1997 , this example is presented in exceptionally sharp, immaculate condition , with excellent case definition throughout. It is accompanied by its box, booklets and tag . A perfect GMT-Master II in one of the model’s most attractive configurations – versatile, iconic and increasingly difficult to find in such outstanding condition. competitions.product: Welcome to
competitions.product_info: Welcome to The Time Vault Club Where passion for horology meets opportunity. We exist to bring the world of exceptional watchmaking closer to you, from iconic Swiss craftsmanship to bespoke British design. Through our curated competitions, we give you the chance to discover and own watches most people only dream of. LIVE COMPETITION All of our prize draws are hosted live, so you can witness every moment as dream watches find new owners. With regular competitions featuring everything from iconic Swiss classics to standout modern releases, the next opportunity is always closer than you think. The watch comes with its original box, papers, booklets, tag and more, and was originally sold in Hong Kong. #31 - The Rolex Explorer II "Polar" 16570 w/ Original Box & Papers Set 2001 The History— The Example The Rolex Explorer II evolved from the earlier Explorer models by introducing a fixed 24-hour bezel and additional GMT hand, transforming it from a simple time-only tool watch into a purpose-built companion for explorers working in environments where distinguishing day from night could prove difficult. The reference 16570 is widely regarded as the sweet spot of the Explorer II lineage, combining classic proportions with the reliable Rolex calibre 3185 movement and independently adjustable GMT hand. Dating to 2001 , this “Polar” example features the model’s iconic white dial, offering superb legibility and a distinctive look that has become increasingly popular with collectors. Presented in excellent, sharp condition , the watch has been exceptionally well preserved and is accompanied by its original box, papers, booklets, tag and accessories . Originally supplied in Hong Kong , it is a superb, complete example of one of Rolex’s most wearable and increasingly collectible sports watches. competitions.product: Win A Tudor Monarch
competitions.product_info: Chrono Win Competitions How it works Winners 0 Collectors Watch Competition Win This Tudor Monarch Time Left to End: 1 Days 21 Hrs 38 Mins 39 Secs 8.33% SOLD 550/600 Tickets Remaining Enter Now winners Year: 2026 Box and papers: Original box and papers included Collectors Watch Competition - Guaranteed Winners - Transparent Draws End Date: July 12, 2026 10:00 pm - Draw Date: 12/07/2026 10:30PM Collectors Watch Competition Win a Tudor Monarch TUDOR Monarch ref. M2639W1A0U-0001 — a brand-new 2026 release and one of TUDOR’s most interesting modern collector pieces. This example features the distinctive dark champagne-colour dial with applied Roman and Arabic hour markers, a finely faceted 39mm stainless steel case, polished and satin finishes, sapphire crystal, 100m water resistance and a two-link faceted steel bracelet with TUDOR’s excellent “T-fit” clasp. From a collector’s perspective, the Monarch is significant because it is not simply another Black Bay variation. It marks TUDOR revisiting one of its historic lines with a much more refined, design-led execution. The papyrus-toned dial, sharp case geometry and unusual numeral layout give it a very different character within the modern TUDOR catalogue. Inside is the Manufacture Calibre MT5662-2U, a self-winding mechanical movement with COSC and METAS certification, a 65-hour power reserve and high-grade finishing visible through the display case back. This gives the Monarch proper modern technical credibility while still carrying a strong vintage-inspired identity. Year: 2026 Condition: Brand new / unworn Box and papers: Original box and papers included A rare opportunity to enter for a first-year TUDOR Monarch — a watch that feels far more collector-focused than a standard daily sports model, combining TUDOR’s centenary design language with modern manufacture movement quality. competitions.product: WIN A VINTAGE CARTIER PARIS TANK LOUIS 78086 18K SOLID GOLD
competitions.product_info: Home – Cartier Paris Tank Louis 78086 WIN A VINTAGE CARTIER PARIS TANK LOUIS 78086 18K SOLID GOLD Value: £7,000 Duration: 7 Days Age: Circa 1980 Max. Entries: 699 Ticket Price: £20 Live Draw: 14/07/26 The Cartier Tank Louis is one of history’s most iconic wristwatches, adored by so many distinguished individuals of the last century. This is one of its best iterations – the 78086 reference in 18k solid gold , with the sought-after Paris-signed dial. A very chic, elegant wristwatch for both men and women. This example is in excellent, unpolished condition with a pristine “Mk 3” dial . 38.34% SOLD 0 Tickets Sold: 268 699 38.34% 431 Tickets remaining 431/699 Tickets Remaining Time Left to End: 3 Days 18 Hours 29 Minutes 25 Seconds ENTER NOW WIN A VINTAGE CARTIER PARIS TANK LOUIS 78086 ENTER NOW 38.34% SOLD 0 Tickets Sold: 268 699 38.34% 431 Tickets remaining 431/699 Tickets Remaining Time Left to End: 3 Days 18 Hours 29 Minutes 25 Seconds Value: £7,000 Duration: 7 Days Age: Circa 1980 Entries: 699 Max. Ticket Price: £20 Live Draw: 14/07/2026 The Cartier Tank Louis is one of history’s most iconic wristwatches, adored by so many distinguished individuals of the last century. This is one of its best iterations – the 78086 reference in 18k solid gold , with the sought-after Paris-signed dial. A very chic, elegant wristwatch for both men and women. This example is in excellent, unpolished condition with a pristine “Mk 3” dial . #32 - The Cartier Paris Tank Louis 78086 18k Solid Gold The History— The Example The Cartier Tank Louis is one of the defining wristwatch designs of the last century. First introduced in 1922 as a refinement of the original Tank, the Tank Louis established the elegant proportions that have come to define Cartier, and has been worn by artists, royalty and cultural icons ever since. This reference, the 78086 , is one of the most desirable vintage iterations. Crafted in 18k solid yellow gold , it features the highly sought-after Paris-signed dial , a detail that collectors have long admired for its rarity and historical significance. This particular watch is presented in excellent, unpolished condition , retaining crisp case lines and a pristine Mk 3 dial . The beautifully balanced proportions make it equally elegant on both men and women, wearing with the understated sophistication that has made the Tank Louis such an enduring classic. A refined and increasingly collectible Cartier – timeless in design, beautifully preserved, and one of the finest expressions of the Tank Louis lineage. ENTER NOW The First Competition of its Kind The Vintage Watch Draw is unique. We’re the first competition website dedicated to collector-grade vintage watches, backed by a trusted expert. After the initial idea over five years ago, we’re so excited to now bring this new concept to you. Curated by A Trusted Expert Our competitions are curated by Alex Stevens, a trusted & reputable vintage watch specialist with lifelong experience in the trade. 12 Month Service Warranty Every watch is fully serviced by our watchmaker & comes with a 12 month mechanical warranty, so you can enjoy your watch hassle-free. Collector-Grade Condition Every watch is meticulously curated by Alex, known for selecting only the finest, collector-grade examples in terms of condition & originality. Low & Transparent Odds We don’t flood the draw with tickets. Our competitions are deliberately limited to keep odds low & your chance of winning fair. Authenticity Guarantee Every watch is thoroughly inspected & fully authenticated by our in-house expert. We are professionals, not enthusiasts or hobbyists. Guaranteed Draws Every draw ends on the stated date, no matter what. We never extend our competitions, even if we haven't sold all the tickets.
